title: Giving names of certain officers of police jury to secretary of state
doc_html:
§1241.  Giving names of certain officers of police jury to secretary of state

Police juries shall keep the secretary of state advised of the names and post office addresses of their respective presidents, vice-presidents and secretaries.

Amended by Acts 1963, No. 53, §1.
doc_text:
§1241.  Giving names of certain officers of police jury to secretary of state
Police juries shall keep the secretary of state advised of the names and post office addresses of their respective presidents, vice-presidents and secretaries.
Amended by Acts 1963, No. 53, §1.
